purpose: Full NotebookLM bibliography routed into the wiki-processing intake lane. Open-access items are downloaded where available; books and unsourced/paywalled items remain citation-only.

status_legend.downloaded_and_text_extracted: PDF downloaded into intake/pdfs and extracted into intake/text
status_legend.citation_only_unsourced: Tracked for wiki routing but not downloaded in this intake pass
